normalization.notes: Store Meitei Mayek text in NFC and preserve source strings for audit. Keep vowel signs and final consonant letters explicit during segmentation review.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: base letters, vowel signs, lonsum final consonant letters, syllable chunks, and loanword clusters
segmentation.notes: Meitei Mayek has distinct final consonant letters and combining vowel signs. Treat lonsum letters as separate pedagogical units when they affect decoding.
